opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My joints ache so deeply I can't sleep, and it moves from my knees to my wrists. It started a couple of days ago and tonight both my wrists are so sore I can barely use my hands. The paracetamol I bought isn't helping at all.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I can't sleep with the throbbing, the pain keeps shifting around, and I'm on my own and struggling to even open a jar or unlock the door.

symptom_narrative.onset: the joint pain started about two days ago, but I've been really wiped out and felt a bit feverish for about five days
symptom_narrative.duration: the aches for two days, the tiredness for about five days
symptom_narrative.character: a deep throbbing ache right in the joints
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — it's keeping me awake all night
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it moves around — it started in my right knee, then went to my left ankle, and tonight it's both my wrists
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really, the paracetamol isn't touching it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving the joints, and trying to use my hands or grip anything
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm exhausted, and I had a flat red rash on my body a few days ago but it's faded away now
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I live on my own and I can't open my medication bottles or make food because my wrists are so sore — I even struggled to unlock my front door

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol I got from the chemist
current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: a couple of tablets, on and off today

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and has no one at home to help right now

objective_data_offered.value: 37.6 degrees on my thermometer at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: both my wrists and one ankle look a bit puffy and swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description on video, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: around 88 beats per minute on my watch
